title: Gratin Brie Bites
description: A bite-sized appetizer featuring creamy brie cheese baked in a mild, fluffy pastry crust.
instructions: Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out small squares of pastry, about 3 inches per side.
Place a small amount of softened brie cheese in the center of each square.
Top the brie cheese with a few pitted Algerian olives and some grated gratin cheese.
Fold the pastry squares in half to form triangles, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the gratin bites on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops with a little bit of milk or beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Serve warm, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
